title: Epic: Installation & Onboarding Excellence
description: Improve ISO builder to production (#77), implement Dakota installer (#195), add production secrets (#78), enhance first-boot experience, and create comprehensive user onboarding. Make Bluefin installation delightful.

title: Epic: Flatpak Ecosystem Expansion
description: Expand flatpak overrides for common apps (Steam, Discord, OBS), create appimage repository for non-flatpak apps (#199), maintain Bazaar curated list, and improve flatpak-first workflow. Build on strong foundation.

title: Epic: Enhanced Privacy & Security Configuration
description: Expand privacy-focused defaults across Firefox, Flatpak apps, and system-level security hardening. Current Firefox config is minimal (3 lines). Opportunity to add tracking protection, telemetry controls, hardware security integration, and privacy-preserving defaults.

title: Epic: AI/ML Integration (Bluespeed)
description: Build comprehensive AI/ML tooling and integration. Ship goose and linux-mcp-server (#156), expand ai-tools.Brewfile, integrate with system workflows, and create curated AI app recommendations. Addresses #100.

title: Epic: Automation & CI/CD Enhancement
description: Improve build automation with changelog generator 2.0 (#181), brew upstream-triggered builds (#123), rebase-helper refactor (#120), SBOM checks (#144), and testing branch support (#130). Strengthen already robust GHA infrastructure.

title: Epic: Setup Hooks Infrastructure Activation
description: Leverage the existing setup hooks infrastructure (privileged/system/user) to automate first-boot experiences, hardware detection, development environment setup, and configuration templates. Infrastructure exists but no hooks are deployed.

title: Epic: CLI Bling & Terminal Excellence
description: Enhance terminal experience with new bling (#71), prettier fastfetch (#176), improved bbrew navigation (#126), better bluefin-cli toggle functionality (#164), and refined MOTD system. Build on solid CLI foundation with 20+ modern tools.

title: Epic: Documentation & Knowledge Base
description: Centralize CONTRIBUTING.md (#91), create architecture documentation, add hook development guide, improve inline documentation, document Brewfile contribution process, and make documentation.desktop open PDF (#185).

title: Epic: Testing & Quality Infrastructure
description: Establish comprehensive testing infrastructure including OpenQA investigation (#159), testing branches (#163), automated validation for JSON/YAML, shell script linting, and integration tests. Currently no visible test infrastructure.

title: Epic: GNOME Desktop Polish
description: Enhance GNOME integration with gradia screenshot tool (#127), improved emoji picker (#125), show details menu in app grid (#182), gnome-help implementation (#171), and refined desktop experience. Build on already excellent GNOME configuration.

title: Epic: Developer Experience Modernization
description: Modernize DX mode with Podman-first workflows, improved devcontainer integration, enhanced VSCode/IDE configurations, and curated mise onboarding. Addresses issues #103, #102, #155.

title: Epic: Hardware Support & Optimization
description: Expand hardware-specific optimizations beyond excellent Framework/gaming support. Add more color profiles, optimize power management, expand udev rules for emerging hardware, and improve detection automation via setup hooks.
